name: 9p24_NFIB_subtelomeric_SD
description: 9p24 distal/subtelomeric region containing NFIB, JAK2, CD274 (PD-L1) and SMARCA2. Site of recurrent ~9p24 amplifications in Hodgkin lymphoma and PMBCL (PD-L1/PD-L2 gain). Flanked by intermediate SDs.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD families plus single-copy CD274/PDCD1LG2/JAK2 amplicon target in lymphoma; rare germline 9p24 deletions/duplications (NFIB) cause neurodevelopmental phenotype.
